name: Indian Food Stall
content: I can’t remember exactly what this place is called, but it is run by the nicest guy I have ever met. I was a regular there when I lived in Limerick, and we typically chatted for a while even after I’d paid for my food. I visited Ireland over a year and a half later, and he instantly recognized me from across the street. We ended up spending another twenty minutes catching up. He runs out of an orange tent, and is usually at the Saturday Milk Market and Tuesday Lunch Market at the university. I would recommend the Chana Masala.
